title: The Kepler Program: A Comprehensive Framework for Adelic Quantum Computing and Ultrametric Physics
description: Synthesis paper covering all 10 phases of the Kepler Program: Ostrowski's Theorem QEC, Multi-Prime Hensel Codec, 2-adic biological coherence, Planck bootstrap, and cross-phase verification matrix.

og.title: The Kepler Program: Adelic Quantum Computing and Ultrametric Physics
og.description: Ten-phase synthesis unifying adelic number theory with quantum computing, ultrametric physics, and informational cosmology.

citation.title: The Kepler Program: A Comprehensive Framework for Adelic Quantum Computing and Ultrametric Physics
